title: How can I move an item to another board when a status changes?
excerpt:

posts.author: Xavier (Xavier)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I’m new on Monday.com, and I’d like to know how to automate this :
“When a status changes, move item to this board in this group”.

I found how to move item in a groupe in the same board, but I can’t find how to change in a different board.

Thank you
Xavier

posts.author: Xavier (Xavier)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Jayin,

Thank you for your help !
